name: zo-agent-registry
description: Open registry of reusable agent templates for Zo Computer users

scripts.build: pnpm --filter @zo-agent-registry/manifest-schema build && pnpm --filter @zo-agent-registry/registry-core build && pnpm --filter @zo-agent-registry/ui build && pnpm --filter @zo-agent-registry/cli build && pnpm --filter web build
scripts.db:migrate: pnpm --filter web exec prisma migrate deploy
scripts.db:migrate:dev: pnpm --filter web exec prisma migrate dev
scripts.db:seed: pnpm --filter web exec prisma db seed
